turns.content: Begin the session now with a short, warm, one or two sentence greeting that welcomes me and gently invites me to share what's on my mind. Keep it light — do not ask anything heavy yet.
Yeah, welcome to our session today. I'm so glad you're here, and I'm here to listen and support you in any way I can.
Hey. I'm super stressed financially. And in relationship as well.
That sounds really tough, financially and in your relationship, it can be a lot to deal with. How long has it been feeling this way for you?
